description: A dashboard for AdGuard DNS metrics.

spec.description: Query volume by DNS record type during the selected dashboard time range.
spec.title: Query Types

spec.expr: topk(100, sum by (host, reason) (agh_dns_filtering_reason_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host, reason) (agh_dns_filtering_reason_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

spec.description: Current top filtered hosts grouped by AdGuard filtering reason. Includes blocklist, blocked-service, safe-search, safe-browsing, parental, and invalid filtered outcomes; allowed and rewritten queries are excluded.
spec.title: Top Filtered Hosts

spec.description: Five-minute rolling average of querylog Elapsed across all valid records, including cached, blocked, rewritten, and upstream-routed queries.
spec.title: Average Response Time

spec.description: This is querylog Elapsed grouped by upstream. AdGuard Home querylog records do not expose pure upstream round-trip duration, and cached queries are excluded.
spec.title: Query Processing Time By Upstream

spec.description: Rate of valid querylog entries processed by the exporter, aggregated across the selected instances.
spec.title: Queries Per Second

spec.description: Skipped records indicate invalid JSON or records missing fields required by the exporter.
spec.title: Skipped Querylog Records

spec.description: AdGuard filtering result reasons as parsed from querylog Result.Reason.
spec.title: Filtering Reasons

spec.description: Skipped records should normally remain zero. Non-zero series point to invalid JSON or missing querylog fields.
spec.title: Skipped Querylog Records By Reason

spec.description: Valid AdGuard querylog entries processed during the selected dashboard time range. Skipped records are excluded.
spec.title: Queries In Range

spec.description: Queries blocked by AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons during the selected dashboard time range. Safe search, safe browsing, parental filtering, and rewrites are tracked separately by filtering reason.
spec.title: Blocked In Range

spec.description: Blocked means AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons.
spec.title: Blocked Percentage

spec.description: Blocked means AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons.
spec.title: Blocked Query Rate

spec.expr: topk(100, sum by (host) (agh_dns_query_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host) (agh_dns_query_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

spec.description: Current top unfiltered query hosts tracked by the exporter since startup or initial querylog load. This is a current top-N snapshot, not a time-range increase.
spec.title: Top 100 Hosts

spec.expr: topk(100, sum by (host) (agh_blocked_dns_query_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host) (agh_blocked_dns_query_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

spec.description: Current top hosts blocked by AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons since startup or initial querylog load.
spec.title: Top 100 Blocked Hosts

title: AdGuard DNS Metrics
